# SPEC-099: Example Inferred Domain

**Status**: INFERRED — generated by /generate-specs on 2026-06-13. Requires human review.

**Covers**: pkg/example/loader.go, pkg/example/cache.go

## Overview

This domain governs how the example loader resolves and caches configuration so that
repeated lookups stay consistent within a single process lifetime.

## MUST

- MUST validate the config path before reading it
- MUST NOT serve a cache entry after its TTL has elapsed

## SHOULD

- SHOULD log a warning when a cache miss falls back to disk

## Open Questions

- [ ] Is the 5-minute TTL intentional or an arbitrary default?

## Cross-references

- SPEC-001: shares the config-path validation contract
